properties.name: Blackwater Falls State Park
properties.notes: Section 1 southern terminus area; lodge, cabins, trails

properties.name: Canaan Valley Resort State Park
properties.notes: Near Canaan Valley trailhead waypoint

properties.name: Cathedral State Park
properties.notes: Old-growth hemlock forest near Aurora, day-use only

properties.name: Kumbrabow State Forest
properties.notes: Highest-elevation state forest in WV; Section 2 area

properties.name: Cass Scenic Railroad State Park
properties.notes: Section 2/3 boundary; historic logging railroad, cabins

properties.name: Seneca State Forest
properties.notes: WV's oldest state forest; cabins, camping, near Section 3

properties.name: Watoga State Park
properties.notes: WV's largest state park; Section 3 area, campground waypoint

properties.name: Calvin Price State Forest
properties.notes: Largely undeveloped; eastern Pocahontas/Greenbrier counties

properties.name: Droop Mountain Battlefield State Park
properties.notes: Civil War site near Hillsboro, scenic overlook tower

properties.name: Beartown State Park
properties.notes: Boardwalk through sandstone formations, day-use only

properties.name: Greenbrier State Forest
properties.notes: Near White Sulphur Springs, Section 4 area

properties.name: Gaudineer Scenic Area (Mon. NF)
properties.notes: Old-growth red spruce; near Gaudineer N/S trailhead waypoints

properties.name: Coopers Rock State Forest
properties.notes: Section 1 gateway; 12,747 acres; rock overlooks, hiking, camping, climbing near I-68

properties.name: Cheat Canyon Wildlife Management Area
properties.notes: 3,836 acres on Cheat River canyon near Albright; whitewater access, hunting, hiking; purchased 2014

properties.name: Canaan Valley National Wildlife Refuge
properties.notes: 16,613 acres; largest high-elevation wetland complex in eastern US; birding, wildlife observation, hunting; Tucker County

properties.name: Dolly Sods Wilderness
properties.notes: 17,776 acres; high-altitude heath barrens, WWII-era bombing range; Section 1 area; 0.7mi from corridor

properties.name: Otter Creek Wilderness
properties.notes: 20,698 acres; Section 1/2 corridor; old-growth hemlock, remote backcountry; Tucker/Randolph counties

properties.name: Laurel Fork North Wilderness
properties.notes: 6,055 acres; Randolph County; 9.5mi of trails along Laurel Fork river; Section 2 area

properties.name: Laurel Fork South Wilderness
properties.notes: 5,784 acres; Randolph County; 9mi of trails; separated from North by County Route 40; Section 2 area

properties.name: Spruce Knob-Seneca Rocks NRA
properties.notes: 100,000 acres; includes WV's highest point (4,863ft) and premier rock climbing at Seneca Rocks; Pendleton County; 7mi from corridor

properties.name: Cranberry Wilderness
properties.notes: 47,815 acres; largest eastern US USFS wilderness; Pocahontas/Webster counties; black bear sanctuary; 8.4mi from corridor

properties.name: Falls of Hills Creek Scenic Area
properties.notes: Holly River State Park — added from PAD-US

properties.name: Cranberry Glades Botanical Area
properties.notes: Holly River State Park — added from PAD-US

properties.name: Holly River State Park
properties.notes: Holly River State Park — added from PAD-US

properties.name: New River Gorge National Park and Preserve
properties.notes: New River Gorge National Park and Preserve — designated 2020, 52,890 ac

properties.name: Green Bank Observatory
properties.notes: Green Bank Observatory — NSF-funded radio astronomy facility, site of the GBT
